commands.review_summary:
Adds `ollama/gemma3:4b` to the small live-model matrix, hydrates Ollama discovery settings in the direct live-model test harness, and updates live-testing docs and coverage.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +281, Docs +1. Total +283 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction; this PR extends live-test coverage. The PR body provides after-change Crabbox live proof for the new Ollama small-model path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Protected maintainer label and draft status make this a human review and landing decision; no narrow automated repair is identified.

target.title: test(agents): include Ollama in small live model matrix
target.body:
Summary
- Add `ollama/gemma3:4b` to the curated small live-model matrix.
- Teach the live model harness to hydrate Ollama discovery when Ollama is in scope, including local default, LAN/self-hosted hosts, Ollama Cloud, configured `baseUrl`, and the documented `baseURL` alias.
- Update live testing docs so local Ollama small-model runs document the default local endpoint.

Refs #86599.

Verification
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/agents/live-model-filter.ts src/agents/model-compat.test.ts src/agents/models.profiles.live.test.ts`
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 perl -e 'alarm shift; exec @ARGV' 180 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/model-compat.test.ts src/agents/models.profiles.live.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`
- Crabbox hosted Ollama live proof: provider `aws`, lease `cbx_828aa916347a`, run `run_e446926f9a59`, command ran `OPENCLAW_LIVE_TEST=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_MODELS=small OPENCLAW_LIVE_PROVIDERS=ollama OPENCLAW_LIVE_MAX_MODELS=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_MODEL_CONCURRENCY=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA_BASE_URL=https://ollama.com OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 timeout 420s corepack pnpm test:live -- src/agents/models.profiles.live.test.ts`; result: `ollama/gemma3:4b` completed prompt, file-read probe, and image probe; 26 tests passed.
- Crabbox changed gate: provider `aws`, lease `cbx_7d3454562c41`, run `run_403275589871`, command ran `corepack pnpm check:changed`; result: exit 0.

Behavior addressed
Small live-model validation now includes an Ollama Gemma route and can discover it without requiring operators to hand-author temporary provider config for the common local/default or hosted live-test paths.

Real environment tested
AWS Crabbox Linux runner against Ollama Cloud via the live model suite, plus local targeted Vitest on the final branch after rebasing to current `origin/main`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch
See the Verification section commands above; the final clean rebase sanity after the green remote gate was `git fetch origin main:refs/remotes/origin/main && git rebase origin/main && git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`, followed by the targeted Vitest command listed above.

Evidence after fix
The hosted live run selected `ollama/gemma3:4b` and completed prompt, file-read probe, and image probe. The changed gate passed core/coreTests/docs lanes on Crabbox after the type fixture correction.

Observed result after fix
`OPENCLAW_LIVE_MODELS=small` can include Ollama in the provider discovery scope, and Ollama live config hydration preserves env overrides, configured `baseUrl`, configured `baseURL`, LAN/self-hosted local markers, and the default local endpoint.

What was not tested
I did not run a native Windows local-Ollama daemon repro for #86599. This PR strengthens the small-model live matrix and proves the hosted Ollama path; it does not claim to close the whole streaming/backpressure issue by itself.
target.author: vincentkoc
